title: Xtra Flaky French Onion Quiche
description: A pungent and flaky French dish featuring single cream and a mother-sauce-base, perfect for a kid-friendly meal. This ovo-vegetarian-friendly quiche is best served in a lacquerware bowl.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the pie crust and place it in a lacquerware bowl.
Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat and cook the onions until they are caramelized.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the single cream, eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the grated cheese to the cream mixture and stir until well combined.
Add the cooked onions to the cream mixture and stir until well combined.
Pour the cream mixture into the pie crust.
Bake the quiche for 35 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the quiche from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
